ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, backfill all existing daily notes with classical music suggestions
ast.target: 启用后，将为所有现有日记填充古典音乐推荐

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 移除指定日期前的链接
